summary: \( \text{HCO}_3/\text{H}_2\text{CO}_3 \) serves as an excellent physiological buffer due to its quick response capability and constant presence within biological systems ensuring efficient regulation of blood pH levels under various conditions. This makes it indispensable compared to other potential buffers like phosphate or protein-based ones. To be precise about what was asked directly by your query—this buffer’s efficiency stems from these two main factors highlighted above.
